final_prompt.prompt:
Create a character illustration of a Hanfu-clad woman playing a guqin in a bamboo forest (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "神秘东方古风" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 宋画 ink-and-color figure painting tradition, 敦煌壁画 celestial figure rendering, contemporary 国风 game splash art (e.g., 王者荣耀 / 原神 character splash style); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include a Hanfu-clad woman playing guqin (古琴) as the focal subject, flowing sleeves (衣袂飘飘)
Scene/backdrop: must include a bamboo forest at night with moonlight filtering through leaves creating dappled shadows (斑驳光影)
Lighting/mood: needs a mysterious moonlit atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
